title: Marketplace Manager - Wrogn Advisory Limited - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Wrogn Advisory Limited - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Wrogn Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wrogn Advisory Limited:
Wrogn Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn Advisory Limited!
